description: 高反差、模块卡片、大标题，适合路演和强表达

identity.composition: 16:9 黑白海报画布；巨型标题压住一侧，荧光卡片以不对称栅格叠放。
identity.hierarchy: 标题先于一切；结论用黑底或荧光底整块承接；正文拆成短卡片。
identity.image_treatment: 图片高反差去色，硬边裁切，叠加荧光编号或黑色标注条。
identity.module_language: 粗黑边、零圆角、偏移硬阴影、模块化标签与编号。
identity.chart_evidence: 粗柱、巨型数值、直接标注；证据以黑框窗口和荧光结论条绑定。
identity.motion: 卡片短距离上推或横向切入；同组按 data-step 整块出现，不做柔和漂浮。

canvas.density: medium, one dominant statement plus 2-4 modules

components.chart: Use thick rectangular bars, direct values, no legend when labels fit beside bars.
components.table: Use black header bands, hard cell rules, and one fluorescent conclusion row or column.
components.evidence_card: Frame the source with a 3px black border; place the interpretation in a touching fluorescent strip.
components.image: Convert to grayscale/high contrast, crop aggressively, and add one hard-edged numbered annotation.
